creator.title: Publisher
creator.body: The Aïobi Meet service is published by Aïobi located at:

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.body: Compliance with digital accessibility standards is a future objective. The site has not yet been audited. However, the team strives to create a site accessible to all.

reuse.title: Content Reuse and Links
reuse.body1: Unless explicitly mentioned of intellectual property held by third parties, the contents of this site are offered under
reuse.body2: You are particularly free to reproduce, copy, modify, extract, transform, communicate, distribute, redistribute, publish, transmit and exploit them provided you mention their source, their date of last update and do not mislead third parties regarding the information contained therein.
reuse.body3: Any public or private site is authorized to establish, without prior authorization, a link (including deep link) to the information disseminated on this site.
